message:
Command `
# Derive all project paths from the design name
DESIGN_NAME="mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
PROJECT_PATH="/workspace"
MCU_DIR="$PROJECT_PATH/${DESIGN_NAME}_mcu"

echo "=== Path derivation ==="
echo "DESIGN_NAME : $DESIGN_NAME"
echo "PROJECT_PATH: $PROJECT_PATH"
echo "MCU_DIR     : $MCU_DIR"
echo "WRAPPER_CONFIG: $MCU_DIR/openlane/${DESIGN_NAME}_wrapper/config.json"
echo "CHIP_CONFIG   : $MCU_DIR/openlane/${DESIGN_NAME}_chip/config.json"
echo ""

echo "=== Verifying config files ==="
ls -lh "$MCU_DIR/openlane/${DESIGN_NAME}_wrapper/config.json" 2>&1
ls -lh "$MCU_DIR/openlane/${DESIGN_NAME}_chip/config.json" 2>&1

echo ""
echo "=== MCU directory tree (2 levels) ==="
find "$MCU_DIR" -maxdepth 2 -not -path '*/\.*' | sort
` executed with exit code 0.

content:
=== Path derivation ===
DESIGN_NAME : mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu
PROJECT_PATH: /workspace
MCU_DIR     : /workspace/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_mcu
WRAPPER_CONFIG: /workspace/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json
CHIP_CONFIG   : /workspace/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_chip/config.json

=== Verifying config files ===
ls: cannot access '/workspace/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json': No such file or directory
ls: cannot access '/workspace/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_chip/config.json': No such file or directory

=== MCU directory tree (2 levels) ===
find: '/workspace/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_mcu': No such file or directory

extras.command:
# Derive all project paths from the design name
DESIGN_NAME="mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
PROJECT_PATH="/workspace"
MCU_DIR="$PROJECT_PATH/${DESIGN_NAME}_mcu"

echo "=== Path derivation ==="
echo "DESIGN_NAME : $DESIGN_NAME"
echo "PROJECT_PATH: $PROJECT_PATH"
echo "MCU_DIR     : $MCU_DIR"
echo "WRAPPER_CONFIG: $MCU_DIR/openlane/${DESIGN_NAME}_wrapper/config.json"
echo "CHIP_CONFIG   : $MCU_DIR/openlane/${DESIGN_NAME}_chip/config.json"
echo ""

echo "=== Verifying config files ==="
ls -lh "$MCU_DIR/openlane/${DESIGN_NAME}_wrapper/config.json" 2>&1
ls -lh "$MCU_DIR/openlane/${DESIGN_NAME}_chip/config.json" 2>&1

echo ""
echo "=== MCU directory tree (2 levels) ==="
find "$MCU_DIR" -maxdepth 2 -not -path '*/\.*' | sort
